2145030.name: Hardcube 2
2145030.description:
Sequel to the original 2016 game. A simple meditative platformer with nice graphics and a pleasant soundtrack. New levels and new biomes.

Go through levels filled with unique traps for each biome. Collect as many points and Collection items as possible. The game is made in the best traditions of the much-loved  original.

Unique and manually created levels, where there are several paths to the finish, and only you can decide which path to choose: dangerous, but with a good reward, or safe, but with a lesser reward. Unique traps for each biome.
